column2: Sap and Better: This is a less stringent color sort where the clear cuttings must have at least one sapwood face.

column1: Masco need three 9500' loads then rest in Smy load
6/4 uppers are unsel but 6/4 1&2com must be Sap&Btr---rather not have any 6/4 2com
Bally need two 8800' loads then rest in Cay load
